name: gibbon_chrY_TSPY_amplicon
description: Nomascus leucogenys chrY TSPY tandem array. AmpliconY copy structure differs strongly between great apes; gibbon estimated copies: 10. Substrate for intrachromosomal NAHR and rapid Y-lineage turnover (Hughes/Page 2010, T2T-ape 2024).

architecture.internal_structure: Y ampliconic family TSPY; intra-Y NAHR via arm-to-arm gene-conversion; copy number under strong meiotic-drive-like turnover.

related_diseases: ape Y spermatogenic phenotypes (analogous to human AZFa/b/c)
